creator: freebsd@linepoint.com
text:
Minor update of haproxy-devel from v1.3.23 -> v1.3.24

(Next update contains will be more major with backported changes from net/haproxy)

Fix: PORTNAME=      haproxy
-PORTVERSION=   1.3.23
+PORTVERSION=   1.3.24
 CATEGORIES=    net
 MASTER_SITES=  http://haproxy.1wt.eu/download/1.3/src/
 PKGNAMESUFFIX= -devel


+Please use the main port (net/haproxy) for the current version.
+
 WWW: http://haproxy.1wt.eu/--Ro7pYpnRE5LYYMKZyVMXkNez5280kjppnKVLzXWyN1nBOWnm
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/net/haproxy-devel.1.3.23/Makefile /usr/ports/net/haproxy-devel/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/net/haproxy-devel.1.3.23/Makefile        2010-05-09 07:22:51.000000000 -0400
+++ /usr/ports/net/haproxy-devel/Makefile       2010-06-16 11:24:23.000000000 -0400
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
